html:
Kabobs is a Meat Food item cooked in the Crock Pot by adding 1 Meats and exactly 1 Twig. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Adding more than 1 Monster Food or Twig will result in Wet Goop, while adding any Fishes will result in Fishsticks.


Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Requires:
  • Excludes:
  • Excludes:

Recipe

×2

Filler cannot be more Twigs

Examples

×2

×2

×2

Tips

  • Replacing the Twigs with nearly any other food item will result in Meatballs, which provides the same Health and Sanity but 25 more Hunger, as well as cooking 25 seconds faster.
  • Kabobs is best made when the player has an abundance of meat, time, and perhaps Crock Pots, as well as the need to stretch filler ingredients.
  • For example: Two Meatballs can be made from 2 Monster Meat and 6 filler, providing 125 , 10 and 6 . Three Kabobs can be made from the same ingredients, plus three Twigs and a Monster Meat, restoring 112.5 , 15 and 9 .
    • The Health and Sanity benefits are marginal and should be weighed against the Twigs and Monster Meat supply (usually in abundance). There should be several pots available to parallelize cooking due to its long cooking time.

Trivia

  • Another spelling for "Kabobs" is "Kebabs".

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.
  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.

'''Kabobs''' is a [[Meats|Meat]] [[Food]] item cooked in the [[Crock Pot]] by adding 1 Meats and exactly 1 [[Twigs|Twig]]. It takes 40 seconds to cook.

Adding more than 1 [[Monster Food]] or Twig will result in [[Wet Goop]], while adding any [[Fishes]] will result in [[Fishsticks]].
__NOTOC__

== Prerequisites ==
*Requires: [[File:Meats Crock Pot(NoMoleworm).png|link=Meat]]
*Requires: [[File:Twigs.png|link=Twig]]
*Excludes: [[File:Fishes Crock Pot.png|link=Fishes]]
*Excludes: [[File:Mandrake.png|link=Mandrake]][[File:Moleworm.png|link=Moleworm]]

== {{Pic32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Meats
|item2 = Twigs
|item3 = Filler
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Kabobs
|note = Filler cannot be more [[Twigs]]
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Morsels
|item2 = Twigs
|item3 = Berry
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Kabobs
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Monster Meats
|item2 = Twigs
|item3 = Honey
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Kabobs
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Morsels
|item2 = Twigs
|item3 = Ice
|count3 = 2
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Kabobs
|dlc = Reign of Giants
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Small Eggs
|item2 = Monster Meat
|item3 = Seaweed
|item4 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Kabobs
|dlc = Shipwrecked
}}

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Replacing the Twigs with nearly any other food item will result in [[Meatballs]], which provides the same [[Health]] and [[Sanity]] but 25 more [[Hunger]], as well as cooking 25 seconds faster.
* Kabobs is best made when the player has an abundance of meat, time, and perhaps Crock Pots, as well as the need to stretch filler ingredients.
* For example: Two Meatballs can be made from 2 Monster Meat and 6 filler, providing 125 {{Hunger}}, 10 {{Sanity}} and 6 {{Hp}}. Three Kabobs can be made from the same ingredients, plus three Twigs and a Monster Meat, restoring 112.5 {{Hunger}}, 15 {{Sanity}} and 9 {{Hp}}.
** The Health and Sanity benefits are marginal and should be weighed against the Twigs and Monster Meat supply (usually in abundance). There should be several pots available to parallelize cooking due to its long cooking time.

== {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* Another spelling for "Kabobs" is "Kebabs".
